# Vivek Aher

> Full-Stack Engineer

## About
I'm Vivek Aher — a full-stack engineer at Q IT Technologies, currently building an AI-native dance choreography platform. I work with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Python, Java, and AWS. I pair program with Claude daily and believe the best way to understand something is to ship it.

## Projects
- Career Vault — AI career companion with RAG-powered resume tailoring (Next.js, Prisma, pgvector, Gemini)
- Patient Portal — Full-stack mini-EMR with admin dashboard and JWT auth (Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL)
- FluidZero — Marketing website for an AI document intelligence startup (Next.js, TypeScript)
- MoodWave — Audio-intelligence platform with mood detection via spectral analysis (Python, FastAPI)
- EcommerceApp — Spring Boot REST API with layered architecture (Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL)
- Leads Tracker — Chrome extension for tab management with localStorage persistence
- Bitcoin Volatility — ETL pipeline for BTC price analysis with Spark and Kubernetes
